title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at HP India

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at HP India
jsonLd.description:
HP India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Software Engineer for our Kochi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About HP India:
HP India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HP India!
